allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/umrah" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Body length: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "Alle Termine|Umrah|verfügbar|begrenzte" | Select-Object -First 10 } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/umrah" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "Alle Termine|verfügbar|begrenzte|ausgebucht" | Select-Object -First 5 } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
